english: Salutations to the honoured, immortal ancestors of blazing splendour
I always bow to those meditating ancestors with divine vision
roman: Namasyami sada tesham dhyaninaam divya chakshusham

english: You are the leader of Indra and others, of Daksha and Maricha too
roman: Indraadinaam cha neta asi Daksha maricha yostatha

english: You are Bhaga, Bhanu and Shakra, the imperishable one
roman: Bhaga Bhanu tvam eva asi Shakrash cha tvam anamayah

english: Salutations, Svadha to the ancestors who receive Svadha
Salutations, Svadha to the ancestors who drink Soma

hindi: पितृस्तोत्रं यः पठेत् श्राद्धकाले नरः सदा।
english: Whoever reads this Pitru Stotram always during the Shraddha period
roman: Pitru stotram yah pathet shraddha kale narah sada

hindi: पितृणां तृप्तिदः स्याद् धन्यः स पुत्र उत्तमः॥
english: Satisfies the ancestors and becomes a blessed, excellent son
roman: Pitrinam triptidah syad dhanyah sa putra uttamah
